While you have Sabotage, your next Attack against an Epic Monster or Turret deals an additional true damage over 3 seconds.

items.descriptionText: 36 Attack Damage 30% Attack Speed 333 Health 15 Ability Haste Spellblade After using an Ability, your next Attack deals bonus physical damage On-Hit. Quicken Attacking grants 20 Move Speed for 2 seconds.

items.name: Unending Despair
items.descriptionText: 400 Health 50 Armor 15 Ability Haste Anguish Every 4 seconds while in combat with champions, deal magic damage to nearby enemy champions and heal for 250% of the damage dealt.

items.name: Void Staff
items.plaintext: Increases magic damage
items.descriptionText: 95 Ability Power 40% Magic Penetration

items.name: Voltaic Cyclosword
items.descriptionText: 55 Attack Damage 10 Lethality 10 Ability Haste Galvanize Damaging an Enemy Champions with an ability triggers Energized if it is ready. Firmament Your Energized Attack deals % target's Current Health as bonus physical damage and grants you bonus Lethality for 4 seconds.

items.name: Warmog's Armor
items.plaintext: Grants massive Health and Health Regen
items.descriptionText: 1000 Health 100% Base Health Regen Warmog's Heart If you have 2000 bonus Health and have not taken damage within 8 seconds, restore Health per second. Warmog's Vitality Gain bonus Health equal to 12% of your Item Health (0).

items.name: Winter's Approach
items.descriptionText: 550 Health 500 Mana 15 Ability Haste Awe Gain Health. Manaflow (8s, max 4 charges) Landing Attacks and Abilities grant 3 max Mana (doubled vs. champions). Transforms into Fimbulwinter at 360 max Mana.

items.name: Wit's End
items.plaintext: Resist magic damage and claw your way back to life.
items.descriptionText: 50% Attack Speed 45 Magic Resist 20% Tenacity Fray Attacks deal bonus magic damage On-Hit.

items.name: Youmuu's Ghostblade
items.plaintext: Activate to greatly increase Move Speed
items.descriptionText: 55 Attack Damage 18 Lethality 4% Move Speed Haunt Gain Move Speed while out of combat. Wraith Step Gain Move Speed and Ghosting for seconds.

items.name: Yun Tal Wildarrows
items.statsText: 50 Attack Damage | 40% Attack Speed | 0% Critical Strike Chance
items.descriptionText: 50 Attack Damage 40% Attack Speed 0% Critical Strike Chance Practice Makes Lethal On-Attack, gain Critical Strike Chance permanently up to 25%. Flurry On-Attacking an enemy champion, gain 30% Attack Speed for 6 seconds (30 second cooldown). Attacks reduce this cooldown by 1 second, increased to 2 seconds for Critical Strikes.

items.name: Zeke's Convergence
items.statsText: 300 Health | 25 Armor | 25 Magic Resist | 10 Ability Haste
items.plaintext: Grants you and your ally bonuses when you cast your ultimate.
items.descriptionText: 300 Health 25 Armor 25 Magic Resist 10 Ability Haste Frostfire Tempest Casting your Ultimate summons a storm around you for 5 seconds. The storm deals 30 magic damage per second to enemy champions and Slows them by 30%.

items.name: Zhonya's Hourglass
items.plaintext: Activate to become invincible but unable to take actions
items.descriptionText: 105 Ability Power 50 Armor Time Stop Enter Stasis for 2.5 seconds.
